attributes.action: All children and teenagers must be offered the Meningitis B jab
attributes.additional_details: Teenagers and toddlers are dying needlessly as a vaccine is available. How many more need to die before this Government sits up and listens?
attributes.background: Offer through the NHS all children and teenagers born prior to 2015 the Meningitis B jab

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: "Offer MenB vaccine to under 22s born before 2015" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/764623
